title: Error Standardization: Placement API
body:
Richer errors in Dapr for the **Placement API**.

**Note**: Please clone this issue and assign the clone of this issue to yourself if you would like to contribute to the error standardization efforts.

# Scope of work

- [ ] Choose 5-10 errors in the Placement API to enrich. Ideally, cover as many errors as possible from the API.
- [ ] Follow the steps outlined in [this README](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/blob/master/pkg/api/errors/README.md) for each error being updated

# Definition of done

- [ ] Update 5-10 errors in the Placement API
- [ ] Update the unit tests, if necessary
- [ ] Write integration tests to cover each updated errors

# Keep in mind

Unless a major version is being released and there is a solid reason for introducing backwards incompatibility, we can't change the API, meaning the HTTP and gRPC status codes, and the error codes must stay the same. An exception to this is the gRPC `StatusCode.UNKNOWN` which should be converted to a specific status.

See the [kit errors pkg README](https://github.com/dapr/kit/blob/main/errors/README.md) for another usage example. For each error being updated, you can use the following helper functions to add error details, see the kit [errors pkg](https://github.com/dapr/kit/tree/main/errors) for more details:

- `WithHelpLink()`
-  `WithHelp()`
-  `WithErrorInfo()` - **Required**
-  `WithFieldViolation()`
-  `WithDetails()`

# Reference PRs
Existing error standardization for: 
- [State API](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/7257)
- [PubSub API](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/7322)

comments.body: Hi @cicoyle , I would like to work on this ticket, since no one has commented, may I continue with this work?

Hi @cicoyle, I made this [WIP] PR to get early feedback, to know if I am on the right path. I added the test based on what I saw in the integration tests in tests/integration/suite/placement/apilevel/... as well as the commit on #7257, where the author replaced several errors of the form `ErrBadXX = APIError{"invalid request: %v", "ERR_BAD_XX", http.StatusBadRequest, grpcCodes.InvalidArgument}`. What I don't see however is typical errors from pkg/messages/predefined.go, related to the Placement API, which can be converted to the Google API guide format for Errors. Could you guide me where I can find typical errors that should be handled or converted to the mentioned format? Thank you.

Hello @cicoyle and @elena-kolevska I'm seeing that this issue has been stall for a few months, I would like to work on it if @fowlerlee is not available. Please let me know if I can continue with this issue, thanks!
